evals.prompt: Turn interview.mp4 in the user workspace into Chinese SRT subtitles at interview.srt in the same workspace. Do not overwrite an existing file.
evals.expected_output: A timestamped UTF-8 SRT file at the requested path, or an explicit skipped status if it already exists.
expectations: The bundled transcribe_media.py script is used with --language zh.
The requested SRT output path is used.
Existing output is not overwritten without --overwrite.

evals.prompt: Recursively transcribe the audio and video files in course-media in the user workspace. Put subtitles under course-srt in the workspace and preserve the directory structure. The machine has limited memory, so do not load multiple models concurrently.
evals.expected_output: SRT files for supported audio and video inputs under a mirrored output tree, processed with one worker.
expectations: Directory mode uses --recursive and the requested output directory.
The workflow keeps --jobs 1 for limited memory.

evals.prompt: Use the model in models/faster-whisper-small in the user workspace to generate an SRT for meeting.m4a. This machine has no network access, and the recording contains many long silent sections.
evals.expected_output: Offline transcription with the local model directory and VAD enabled.
expectations: The local model path is passed with --local-files-only.
The workflow does not attempt to download a model.
